name: Grown Rogue International Inc.
business: Grown Rogue International Inc. is a fully integrated cannabis brand that produces and sells premium flower, pre-rolls, and related products to licensed dispensaries in Oregon, Michigan, New Jersey, and expanding into Illinois and Minnesota.

exposures.sentence: We manage indoor and outdoor growing facilities in the Rogue Valley of Southern Oregon to take advantage of the unique microclimates inherent to each of the various farm locations that help create varied flavor and product profiles while retaining the unique core characteristics that we believe consumers desire.
In addition, Grown Rogue launched a new brand of pre-rolls, a rapidly growing category, called Yeti in 2023.

catalysts.event: Substantial completion of Grandview Phase II project in Paulsboro, New Jersey
catalysts.sentence: Substantial completion of the project is currently targeted for April 15, 2026.

catalysts.event: First product sales from Minnesota cultivation facility
catalysts.sentence: We currently anticipate products being available for sale beginning in the first quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Entry into Membership Interest Purchase Agreement to acquire 49% of Sea Craft, LLC in Illinois
catalysts.sentence: On March 11, 2026, we, through our majority owned subsidiary Grown Rogue Management Associates LLC ( GRMA ), entered into a Membership Interest Purchase Agreement with the members of Sea Craft, LLC ( Sea Craft ), the holder of an Illinois Adult Use Cannabis Craft Grower License, pursuant to which GRMA agreed, subject to Sea Craft s receipt regulatory approvals necessary to consummate the transaction, to acquire 49% of Sea Craft s issued and outstanding ownership interests, and to grant the majority holder of Sea Craft s remaining issued and outstanding ownership interests an option, subject to certain conditions precedent, to require GRMA to purchases the interests.
